title: Zerene Created!
description: The official client modpack for use with  Zerene's server. Features Create, Steam 'n' Rails, AE2 and much more.
body:
# *Zerene Created!* ### A Fabric client-side modpack for use with Zerene's modded server. This modpack can be played in single player, too.
### What's the gist? Our pack is designed to be fairly relaxing without any particular goal in mind other than to build a central base and then build out a rail network and use trains to goto outposts/remote factories. AE2 is included to help with managing storage/crafting/automation etc. This modpack makes heavy use of Create and additions to Create, Steam 'n' Rails and features many other QoL mods that help.
For installation guidence, see Modrinth's guide here
